es.title: Hacer las tareas escolares (Centro de temas relacionados con las tareas escolares)
es.description: in English Tareas escolares Los niños logran el éxito en la escuela cuando los padres se involucran en las tareas escolares de sus hijos. Más información • La ayuda durante la escuela primaria Ayudar con las tareas escolares 10 maneras de ayudar • La ayuda durante la escuela intermedia 10 maneras de ayudar • La ayuda durante la escuela secundaria Ayudar con las tareas escolares 10 maneras de ayudar Comenzar bien el año escolar • La vuelta a la escuela Los niños suelen tener dificultades para hacer la transición de regreso a la escuela. Facilitar el regreso • Organizarse Con su ayuda y algo de práctica, los niños pueden aprender a organizarse usando estos tres consejos. Haga esto • Reuniones entre padres y maestros Los niños y los adolescentes se desempeñan mejor en la escuela cuando los padres se involucran. Sepa cómo hacerlo Fuentes de información adicionales Scroll List Left • Plan 504 • IEP • Educación especial • TDAH • Dificultades en la escuela Scroll List Right Compartir: • Compartir en Facebook • Compartir en Twitter • Compartir en Pinterest

en.title: Doing homework (Homework topics center)
en.description: en español Helping Your Child With Homework Help kids and teens get a handle on their homework and find tips to make the school year go a little smoother. Homework Help • Helping Your Elementary Schooler Succeed Here's how to help your school-aged child get a strong start this school year. Homework help 10 steps to success • Helping Your Middle Schooler Succeed The middle school years are a time of change. Your support makes a big difference. 10 steps to success • Helping Your High Schooler Succeed Teens are moving toward independence, but they still need your support and guidance. Help make the high school years easier to navigate. Homework help 10 steps to success Make This Year the Best Ever! Help kids have a successful school year by making sure they are up-to-date on vaccines, sports physicals, and more. Are Your Child's Vaccines Up-to-Date? Find out which vaccines are recommended and when to get them. Vaccines kids and teens need Vaccine schedule Signing Your Child Up for Sports? Find out why all student athletes need to get a sports physical before starting the season. Getting a sports physical How to Choose the Right Backpack When backpacks are too heavy or don't fit right, they can strain muscles and joints — leading to back pain. Here's what to look for. Backpack safety tips How Parents Can Help • My child is struggling in school. What can I do? With the right support, most kids can get back on track and succeed at school. Learn how • How can I help my child get organized? This easy 3-step method can help kids get organized — and stay that way! Try it • How can I prepare for a parent-teacher conference? Kids and teens do better in school when parents get involved. Here's how to make the most of parent-teacher conferences. Learn more Extra Help Resources Scroll List Left • 504s • IEPs • Special Ed • ADHD • Challenges at School Scroll List Right Share: • Share to Facebook • Share to Twitter • Share to Pinterest
